event: Finnish mythological ceiling mural depicting battle and fantastical scenes
description: A photograph looking upward at a domed ceiling covered with painted murals depicting scenes from Finnish mythology. The murals show dynamic scenes including a horseman or warrior on a rearing horse, a large eagle or bird of prey, battling figures, serpentine forms, and fire. The composition is divided into segments by the dome's architecture. The painting style is bold and dramatic with warm earth tones, greens, and oranges. The scenes appear to depict episodes from the Kalevala, the Finnish national epic. The dome has a circular skylight at the apex.

_meta.title: Ilmarinen ploughing the Viper-field and The Defense of the Sampo
